name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN in Las Vegas offers collateral-based pawn loans, gold buying, firearms pawning, and pre-owned retail merchandise at 25–70% off retail prices.
description_long:
EZPAWN is a national pawn shop chain with a location at 1501 East Charleston Boulevard in Las Vegas, Nevada. The store operates six days a week with extended weekday and Saturday hours (9am–7pm) and reduced Sunday hours (12pm–5pm). As part of a larger EZPAWN family of stores, this location participates in the company's EZ+ digital rewards and account management platform, reflecting a more modernized approach to the traditional pawn shop model.

The store provides a broad range of financial and retail services. Core offerings include collateral-based pawn loans, where customers bring items of value and receive a cash loan against them. Gold and diamond jewelry buying is available with on-site testing to determine accurate value. At this specific location, firearms loans and outright purchases are offered, covering rifles, shotguns, and handguns. The store also sells pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25–70% off retail, with inventory updated daily. An online shop extends browsing beyond the physical location. Additional services include an Instant Quote tool for electronics, a layaway program requiring only 10% down, and Take Today third-party financing for spreading payments over time. Product protection plans and a Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning round out the offerings. Auto Loans are also listed as a service at this store.

Several features distinguish this EZPAWN location from independent pawn shops. The EZ+ Rewards Program allows customers to manage pawns, layaways, and rewards digitally and make online payments — a convenience not typical of standalone pawn shops. The Instant Quote tool provides upfront electronic item valuations before a customer visits. The firearms service includes secure on-site storage and appraisal. The Jewelry VIP Program offers structured perks including 100% trade-up amounts on future jewelry purchases and guaranteed loan values, which reduces uncertainty for repeat customers.

EZPAWN serves a specific niche: consumers who need fast liquidity against owned assets or who want deeply discounted pre-owned goods without a credit check. Pawn loans are short-term, fee-bearing instruments — not low-cost credit — and the actual loan terms, interest rates, and fees are not disclosed on the website, requiring an in-store visit for specifics. Redemption of pawned firearms involves a background check. Customers primarily benefit from speed and accessibility rather than favorable loan economics. For bargain shoppers, the daily-rotating pre-owned inventory can offer genuine value, particularly on electronics and jewelry.
pros: EZ+ Rewards Program allows online pawn and layaway management and payments from any device
Instant Quote tool provides upfront electronics valuations before visiting the store
Layaway available with only 10% down and affordable monthly payments
Expert gold and diamond buyers with on-site metal testing for accurate pricing
Firearms loans and purchases available at this location with secure on-site storage
Pre-owned merchandise priced 25–70% below new retail with daily inventory updates
Extended weekday and Saturday hours (9am–7pm) with Sunday availability
cons: Pawn loan fees, interest rates, and full terms are not disclosed on the website — require in-store inquiry
Not all services (including online payments) are available at all locations; Sunday hours are significantly reduced
Firearms redemption requires a background check, adding a step and potential delay
Take Today financing depends on third-party credit approval, not guaranteed
Auto loan details, rates, and eligibility criteria are not described on the store page
best_for: Consumers needing same-day cash against electronics, jewelry, gold, or firearms without a credit check
Bargain hunters seeking discounted pre-owned brand-name electronics, tools, or jewelry
Firearms owners looking for collateral-based loans with secure on-site storage
Unbanked or credit-constrained individuals who need short-term liquidity against owned assets
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for consumers who own items of value and need fast cash without a credit check, or shoppers seeking deeply discounted pre-owned merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs — fees and interest — are not disclosed online and are typically high relative to conventional credit, making this a last-resort liquidity option rather than a cost-effective borrowing tool.
services: Pre-owned retail merchandise sales (25–70% off retail)
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Product Protection Plan for electronics and audio/video
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning
EZ+ Rewards Program with EZ Points on pawn and purchase transactions
